These matches have been the subject of much discussion and analysis, with fans and analysts alike eager to see how the boxer's power punches translate into results. This number is not only a testament to his strength but also to his ability to maintain consistency throughout the match.

This is a significant jump, showing that the boxer is not only maintaining his previous level of performance but also improving it.
